data.body: AC amendment (gap-2): Add GIT_* caller-env isolation test and exit-code propagation test. test_ticketlib_does_not_mutate_caller_git_env: export GIT_DIR=/tmp/fake, source library, call ticket_show, assert GIT_DIR still /tmp/fake in caller scope. test_ticket_show_returns_nonzero_on_missing_ticket: call with bogus id, assert non-zero return code propagates through _ticketlib_dispatch subshell to caller.
